title: tui/event.rs: /dm also sends plaintext whisper regardless of mls_active
description: Same issue as nie-po5v.15 (cli) but in tui/src/event.rs handle_slash() 'dm' branch (line 1084). The payload is always serde_json::to_vec(ClearMessage::Chat { text }) with no MLS encryption, even when state.mls_active = true. The relay can read the DM. Fix: when state.mls_active, encrypt the plaintext via state.mls_client.encrypt() + pad() before placing it in the WhisperParams payload, matching the main send_chat path's intent.
